title: "Death Has a Shadow" // "We Cranked Our Hogs Pretty Hard"
description: The format is introduced and immediately derailed. Stewie Gay Watch officially launches (verdict: not yet). Tyler reveals he watched the original broadcast as an 8-year-old. Collin did not see it until middle school and we judge him for it. Jason plays the theme song entirely too loud. The hogs are cranked. 461 episodes remaining.
